description: Curated index of helper scripts and commands.
source_of_truth_note: scripts/ahl.py and script docs are authoritative; this registry supports command discovery.

items.name: ahl.py
items.purpose: Provide dependency-free helper commands for local checks, registry validation, context briefing, and scaffolding.
items.safe_use_notes: Does not run providers, prompts, daemons, or hidden runtime state.

items.name: doctor
items.purpose: Check expected repo foundations and ignore rules.

items.name: promptset
items.purpose: Inspect prompt filenames, numbering, gaps, duplicates, and strict two-digit naming.
items.safe_use_notes: Checks filenames only; prompt prose quality remains human-reviewed.

items.name: validate
items.purpose: Run a lightweight structural validation gate across foundations and promptset numbering.

items.name: registry
items.purpose: List and validate curated registry JSON files.
items.safe_use_notes: Validates maps but does not make them authoritative.

items.name: checkpoint, scaffold-run, new-handoff, metadata-example
items.purpose: Create or print small workflow scaffolds for context, run manifests, temporary handoffs, and run records.
items.safe_use_notes: Generated files are scaffolds and may require `--force` for intentional overwrite.

items.name: resume
items.purpose: Print a grounded session context briefing from visible repo state.
